# PDF RAG Chat

## Description
Chat with your PDFs using RAG with Chroma vector search and Groq LLM.

## Tech Stack
Python 3.11, Streamlit, LangChain, ChromaDB, Groq (llama-3.3-70b-versatile), HuggingFace Embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2), PyPDFLoader

## Core Files
- app.py: Single-file Streamlit app (<120 lines) — PDF ingestion, vector store, chat

## Key Patterns
- Ingestion: PyPDFLoader → RecursiveCharacterTextSplitter(chunk=1000, overlap=200) → HuggingFaceEmbeddings → Chroma
- Retrieval: vectorstore.as_retriever(search_type="mmr", k=5, fetch_k=15, lambda_mult=0.5)
- Generation: ChatPromptTemplate (System + Context + Question) → ChatGroq → response.content
- Multi-file support: accept_multiple_files=True in st.file_uploader

## Entry Point
streamlit run app.py

## API Keys (.env)
GROQ_API_KEY

## Environment
- No persistence (in-memory Chroma per session)
- Chat history in st.session_state.messages
- Ignores chroma_db/, chroma-db/, vector store/ in gitignore
